transcript: Speaker A: Hello. [Hello.] Speaker B: Hello. [Hello.] Speaker A: अरे... how are... how are... sorry. [Oh... how are... how are... sorry.] Speaker B: अरे नाही नाही चालतं. मला पण इंग्लिश मराठी मिक्स होतंय सगळं. तू एक काम कर असं बोल, "How are you?". [Oh no, it's okay. Even my English and Marathi get mixed up. Do one thing, say it like this, "How are you?".] Speaker A: How are you? Thank you नेहा. पण तुमची इंग्लिश तर चांगली असेल ना? [How are you? Thank you Neha. But your English must be good, right?] Speaker B: नाही, मी पण इथेच बेसिक शिकलीय. आता ॲडव्हान्स लेव्हलला चाललीय. [No, I also learned basic here. Now I'm moving to advanced level.] Speaker A: असं का? मग कशी सुधारली तुमची इंग्लिश? [Is that so? Then how did your English improve?] Speaker B: असंच की, लोकांशी इथे MySivi ॲपवर इंग्लिशमध्ये गप्पा मारते आणि होते इंग्लिशची प्रॅक्टिस. [Just like this, by chatting with people in English on the MySivi app, and that's how English practice happens.] Speaker C: MySivi ॲपवर १ कोटी लोक स्पोकन इंग्लिशची प्रॅक्टिस करतात. तुम्ही पण आजच सुरू करा. ट्रायल फक्त १ रुपयात. [Over 1 crore people practice spoken English on the MySivi app. You should also start today. Trial for just 1 rupee.]
on_screen_text: Be polite and respect the other person's opinion. Avoid rude comments. Diya. Ram. practices for an average of 6 minutes/call. 28:13 minutes remaining for today's call. Call may be recorded to ensure a quality experience. MySivi. Start English Learning - MySivi. 10M+ Downloads. Install. MySivi Premium. LIMITED TIME OFFER. ₹1. Autopay, cancel anytime. 1,200 learners purchased today. 24/7 AI English Teacher. 500+ Exercises and Lessons. Unlimited Access. Trial at No Cost | Practice English Now.
summary: The ad features a split-screen format with a simulated voice call between two users on the MySivi app on top, and satisfying ASMR footage on the bottom. One user helps the other practice basic English phrases, explaining how the app has helped her improve from basic to advanced levels through daily conversation. The ad concludes with a call to action highlighting over 10 million downloads and a premium trial offer for just 1 rupee.
